name: Cornmeal Hoecake
recipeIngredient: Cold water, as needed for mixing
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the corn meal with cold water until it forms a workable dough. Allow to stand briefly to assess if additional water is required.
2. Grease a heavy griddle and preheat it.
3. Pour a ladleful of the mixture onto the hot griddle, shaping it into a round cake about half an inch thick.
4. Reduce the heat and allow one side to brown slightly.
5. Turn the hoecake and continue cooking until both sides are evenly browned, approximately thirty minutes total.
6. Serve immediately with butter.
Mrs. S. R. Dull,
1928
Southern Cooking
Grosset & Dunlap,
New York
